info.name: ChainBois API - Phase 1 (Auth + Game + Leaderboard)
info.description:
Phase 1 endpoints: Auth, Game, Leaderboard, Health & Settings.

The `base_url` is pre-set to the live testnet API at https://test-2.ghettopigeon.com/api/v1.

## Quick Start — Testing Authenticated Endpoints
1. Import this collection into Postman
2. Create a Postman Environment and set `base_url` and `test_address`
3. Run **Create User** to register (or skip if user already exists)
4. Run **Simulate Login** — this auto-stores the token in `{{firebase_token}}`
5. Run **Login** — this links your wallet and creates your MongoDB user
6. All other authenticated requests will use the stored token automatically

Tokens expire after 1 hour. Run Simulate Login again when you get 401.

## How to Import
1. Open Postman (desktop app or web)
2. Click **Import** (top-left)
3. Drag and drop this JSON file, or click **Upload Files** and select it
4. The collection appears in the sidebar under **Collections**
5. Create an Environment with the variables listed below

## Pre-Configured Test User
- Email: goonerlabs@gmail.com
- Wallet: 0x5220C9d3Ed555C5eC1505609a9572dF7819dc329

## Snowtrace Explorer (Fuji Testnet)
- BattleToken: https://testnet.snowtrace.io/address/0xcC704c908A37A78d944a8310F8ebc0c0456CbeC0
- ChainBoisNFT: https://testnet.snowtrace.io/address/0xB2FDDb56D85073BCBE245D46dbC1BE4D4541305b
- WeaponNFT: https://testnet.snowtrace.io/address/0xa2AFf3105668124A187b1212Ab850bf8b98dD07d
- NFT Store Wallet: https://testnet.snowtrace.io/address/0x469622d0FB5ED43B2e7C45E98D355F2cf03816a0
- Weapon Store: https://testnet.snowtrace.io/address/0xD40e6631617B7557C28789bAc01648A74753739C
- Prize Pool: https://testnet.snowtrace.io/address/0xc81F02E4bbA2F891E5D831f2dDDD9eDD61F3F92e

request.description:
Check if a user with the given email exists in Firebase Auth.

No auth required. Replace the email in the URL path.
Returns { exists: true/false }.

response.name: Invalid Email

request.description:
Create a new Firebase Auth user and write initial data to Firebase RTDB.

No auth token required.

Rate limit: 20 requests per 15 minutes.

Get a valid Firebase ID token for testing without the frontend.

This endpoint looks up the Firebase Auth user by email, creates a custom token, and exchanges it for a real ID token via the Firebase REST API. The returned token works with all authenticated endpoints (login, me, logout, verify-assets, training, etc.).

Prerequisites:
- User must exist in Firebase Auth (use Create User first)
- FIREBASE_API_KEY must be set in the server's .env

The Test script automatically stores the token in the {{firebase_token}} environment variable.

No auth required. Rate limited: 20 requests per 15 minutes.
Tokens expire after 1 hour — call this again when you get 401.

response.name: User Not Found
Invalid Email

request.description:
Login with Firebase Auth token + wallet address.

Lookup: address-primary, uid-fallback (for web2->web3 upgrade).
Checks on-chain NFT ownership, syncs assets to Firebase for Unity game.
Auto-upgrades WEB2->WEB3 when NFT detected, auto-downgrades when lost.

The login endpoint now has username fallbacks: if the Firebase RTDB has no username, it checks Firebase Auth's displayName, then falls back to the email prefix. This prevents empty usernames in the database.

Rate limit: 20 requests per 15 minutes.

request.description:
Get the authenticated user's profile.

Returns user data from MongoDB (no blockchain call).

Logout: revokes Firebase refresh tokens and clears game data in Firebase RTDB.

After logout, Firebase RTDB is set to: hasNFT=false, level=0, weapons=null.

Re-fetch NFT ownership from on-chain and update MongoDB + Firebase.

Use this to refresh asset data without re-logging in.

request.description:
Set the user's active ChainBoi NFT (CB).

Verifies on-chain that the user owns the specified tokenId.
Tokens #1-50 exist on Fuji testnet (owned by nft_store wallet).

response.name: Unowned Token

request.description:
Download the Windows game build.

No auth required. Streams the zip file.
Currently returns 404 (game file not uploaded yet).

Download the Android APK.

No auth required. Streams the APK file.
Currently returns 404 (game file not uploaded yet).

Get game download count, trailer URL, and platform availability.

No auth required.

Get the overall leaderboard (all-time scores).

No auth required.
Query params: limit (default 100, max 500), page (default 1).

Get leaderboard for the last 24 hours.

No auth required.
Valid periods: 30min, 1hour, 24hours, 2days, week, month, year, all.

Get the weekly leaderboard.

No auth required.
Supports custom date ranges via startDate/endDate query params (ISO 8601).

Get leaderboard with custom page size.

limit: 1-500 (default 100)
page: 1-indexed (default 1)

Get a specific user's rank on the leaderboard.

Requires auth. Set test_uid variable.
Query param: period (default 'all').
Valid periods: 30min, 1hour, 24hours, 2days, week, month, year, all.

Get a specific user's weekly rank.

Requires auth.

Get public game settings (costs, thresholds, etc.).

No auth required. The contracts field is excluded for security.

Check API and MongoDB status.

Returns 200 if healthy, 503 if MongoDB disconnected.
